message:
fix: make WORK_DONE notifications ephemeral wisps, not permanent beads

WORK_DONE messages from gt done were creating permanent HQ beads because
the subject prefix was not in the shouldBeWisp() auto-detect list. Every
polecat completion generated a permanent bead that accumulated as cruft.

Belt-and-suspenders: set Wisp: true on the message AND add work_done
to the wisp prefix safety net list.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -889,6 +889,7 @@ notifyWitness:
 			From:    sender,
 			Subject: fmt.Sprintf("WORK_DONE: %s", issueID),
 			Body:    strings.Join(bodyLines, "\n"),
+			Wisp:    true, // Operational notification — must not create permanent bead
 		}
 		if err := townRouter.Send(workDoneNotification); err != nil {
 			style.PrintWarning("could not notify witness of work done: %v", err)
